meta.description: Postgres Tool node for AI Agent - allows agent to execute SQL queries
meta.usage: Connect to AI Agent node - agent will write SQL dynamically based on user questions
meta.source: Cole Medin RAG template - Query Document Rows pattern

notes.toolDescription: This description is shown to the AI agent - teach it what queries are possible
notes.fromAI: $fromAI('sql_query') extracts the SQL the agent generates from its reasoning
notes.safety: The agent can only SELECT - it cannot DROP tables or modify data (read-only queries)
